assertionResults.fullName: CalendarView Component renders scheduled tasks as events
assertionResults.title: renders scheduled tasks as events

assertionResults.fullName: CalendarView Component filters out tasks with invalid scheduledTime
assertionResults.title: filters out tasks with invalid scheduledTime

assertionResults.fullName: CalendarView Component opens QuickTaskDialog when clicking a slot
assertionResults.title: opens QuickTaskDialog when clicking a slot

assertionResults.fullName: CalendarView Component creates a new task via QuickTaskDialog
assertionResults.title: creates a new task via QuickTaskDialog

assertionResults.fullName: CalendarView Component opens TaskEditDialog when double clicking an event
assertionResults.title: opens TaskEditDialog when double clicking an event

assertionResults.fullName: CalendarView Component saves updated task from TaskEditDialog
assertionResults.title: saves updated task from TaskEditDialog

assertionResults.fullName: CalendarView Component Calendar Task Creation creates task with scheduledTime in ISO string format
assertionResults.title: creates task with scheduledTime in ISO string format

assertionResults.fullName: CalendarView Component Calendar Task Creation creates task with string ID
assertionResults.title: creates task with string ID

assertionResults.fullName: CalendarView Component Calendar Task Creation includes date and scheduledTime when creating from calendar slot
assertionResults.title: includes date and scheduledTime when creating from calendar slot

assertionResults.fullName: QuickTaskDialog Component renders dialog when open
assertionResults.title: renders dialog when open

assertionResults.fullName: QuickTaskDialog Component can create task
assertionResults.title: can create task

assertionResults.fullName: QuickTaskDialog Component closes on cancel
assertionResults.title: closes on cancel

assertionResults.fullName: onTaskUpdate is called correctly when dragging a task with alphanumeric ID
assertionResults.title: onTaskUpdate is called correctly when dragging a task with alphanumeric ID

assertionResults.fullName: Journal Questions Consistency should have mobile questions as a subset of desktop questions
assertionResults.title: should have mobile questions as a subset of desktop questions

assertionResults.fullName: Journal Questions Consistency should have matching question IDs between mobile and desktop
assertionResults.title: should have matching question IDs between mobile and desktop

assertionResults.fullName: Journal Questions Consistency should have matching sections for shared question IDs
assertionResults.title: should have matching sections for shared question IDs

assertionResults.fullName: Journal Questions Consistency should have compatible question text for shared IDs
assertionResults.title: should have compatible question text for shared IDs

assertionResults.fullName: Journal Questions Consistency should maintain cross-platform data consistency
assertionResults.title: should maintain cross-platform data consistency

assertionResults.fullName: Journal Questions Consistency should have the correct number of questions on each platform
assertionResults.title: should have the correct number of questions on each platform

assertionResults.fullName: Journal Questions Consistency should have Evening questions with consistent IDs
assertionResults.title: should have Evening questions with consistent IDs

assertionResults.fullName: AuthContext Analytics logs sign_up event for new users
assertionResults.title: logs sign_up event for new users

assertionResults.fullName: AuthContext Analytics logs only login event for returning users
assertionResults.title: logs only login event for returning users

assertionResults.fullName: useFirestoreDoc should initialize with default value and loading true
assertionResults.title: should initialize with default value and loading true

assertionResults.fullName: useFirestoreDoc should update data when snapshot is received
assertionResults.title: should update data when snapshot is received

assertionResults.fullName: useFirestoreDoc should use initial value if document does not exist
assertionResults.title: should use initial value if document does not exist

assertionResults.fullName: useFirestoreDoc should NOT reset data to initialValue immediately when path changes
assertionResults.title: should NOT reset data to initialValue immediately when path changes

assertionResults.title: renders main layout components

assertionResults.title: does NOT show the Reset All Tasks button (moved to Settings)

assertionResults.title: can create a task via interaction

assertionResults.fullName: TaskList Component renders priority sections correctly
assertionResults.title: renders priority sections correctly

assertionResults.fullName: TaskList Component renders filtered tasks for the selected date
assertionResults.title: renders filtered tasks for the selected date

assertionResults.fullName: TaskList Component does not render tasks for other dates
assertionResults.title: does not render tasks for other dates

assertionResults.fullName: TaskList Component shows empty state when no tasks exist
assertionResults.title: shows empty state when no tasks exist

assertionResults.fullName: TaskList Component can toggle task completion
assertionResults.title: can toggle task completion

assertionResults.fullName: TaskList Component logs task_uncompleted analytics event when unchecking task
assertionResults.title: logs task_uncompleted analytics event when unchecking task

assertionResults.fullName: TaskList Component can quick add a task
assertionResults.title: can quick add a task

assertionResults.fullName: TaskList Component scrolls to completed section when expanded
assertionResults.title: scrolls to completed section when expanded

assertionResults.fullName: NotesPanel Component renders with correct date header
assertionResults.title: renders with correct date header

assertionResults.fullName: NotesPanel Component loads content from Firestore for the specific date
assertionResults.title: loads content from Firestore for the specific date

assertionResults.fullName: NotesPanel Component updates content locally immediately but debounces persistence
assertionResults.title: updates content locally immediately but debounces persistence

assertionResults.fullName: NotesPanel Component changes content when date changes
assertionResults.title: changes content when date changes

assertionResults.title: renders demo content for logged-out user

assertionResults.title: sets correct tooltips (aria-labels) on custom toolbar buttons

assertionResults.title: renders the toolbar container with correct ID for scrollable layout
